prompt:
A character illustration in a cut-out style. Build the figure from large flat color shapes, like pieces of cut paper, with minimal linework. Simplify the hair and clothing into large clean masses with no fine detail, so the character reads primarily through silhouette. Use a limited palette, almost no texture, minimal shading, a still centered composition, an empty background, and a clear poster-like graphic presence. Keep facial details minimal and expression restrained, conveying mood through proportion, silhouette, and shape composition.
